heading: District courts; fines, forfeitures and criminal proceedings
label: 1918 District courts; fines, forfeitures and criminal proceedings
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 822 (R.S. § 974).Changes were made in phraseology.

children.label: a
children.text: Costs shall be included in any judgment, order, or decree rendered against any person for the violation of an Act of Congress in which a civil fine or forfeiture of property is provided for.

children.label: b
children.text: Whenever any conviction for any offense not capital is obtained in a district court, the court may order that the defendant pay the costs of prosecution.
